user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a paginated list of all custodian assets with their category, name, vendor, asset ID, serial number, purchase order date, warranty and status, so that I can track the full asset inventory
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset List screen; When the list loads; Then assets are displayed with category, name, vendor, asset ID, serial number, purchase order date, warranty and status across paginated results

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter assets by a period date range using From and To calendars, so that I can view assets relevant to a specific timeframe
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset List screen; When I select a From and To period and search; Then only assets within that period are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter assets by status such as Assigned, In Stock, Loan, Repair, Retired or Confirm Return, so that I can focus on assets in a particular state
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset List screen; When I choose a status and search; Then only assets with that status are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter assets by asset category, so that I can narrow the list to a specific category of assets
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset List screen; When I select an asset category and search; Then only assets in that category are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset all applied filters, so that I can quickly return to the default unfiltered asset list
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied period, status or category filters; When I click Reset; Then all filters clear and the full asset list is restored

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search assets after setting filters, so that the list refreshes with matching results
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set one or more filters; When I click Search; Then the asset list refreshes to show matching records
